q1_process: AI-powered demand forecasting for a mid-sized retail chain (50 stores)
q2_decision_type: regression (forecasted units sold per SKU per store per week)
q3_volume: 5 years of POS data, inventory logs, weather, local events data
q3_quality: clean, POS data from 100% of stores, no PII
q3_compliance: PCI DSS if using payment data (we don't, so low risk)
q4_regulatory: None specific beyond standard data privacy
q4_distribution: 70% of losses are from top 100 SKUs
q5_current_performance: 75% weighted MAPE, 4 hours of manual work weekly
q5_frustrations: inaccurate for new products, slow to react to trends, tedious manual updates
q6_primary_metric: Reduce overstock/stockout losses by 40%, reduce manual work to <30 mins/week
q6_threshold: >85% weighted MAPE top 20% SKUs, <15 min forecast runtime
q6_measurement: Monthly inventory shrink/stockout reports, POS vs forecast accuracy dashboard
